footnote: Lunch pricing applies until 3 PM. Online ordering via Toast automatically switches to dinner pricing at 3 PM.
proteinNote: Popular Combinations, Curries, and some Specialties can be prepared with your choice of protein. Prices shown are starting prices.

items.name: Edamame
items.description: Seasoned Japanese snack — steamed soybean pods seasoned with salt.

items.name: Chicken Satay
items.description: Charcoal-grilled chicken tenders on skewers, marinated with Thai spices, served with peanut sauce & cucumber sauce.

items.name: Chicken Wings
items.description: Deep-fried chicken wings marinated with herbs & house sauce.

items.name: Sriracha Wings
items.description: Chicken wings drizzled with homemade sriracha sauce.

items.name: Thai Crispy Rolls
items.description: Crispy rice paper filled with chicken & mixed vegetables, served with sweet chili sauce. Vegetarian version available.

items.name: Thai Soft Spring Rolls
items.description: Steamed vermicelli, cooked chicken, lettuce, carrot, cucumber wrapped in fresh spring roll skins, served with sweet & sour sauce, topped with ground peanuts.

items.name: Shrimp Shumai
items.description: Steamed or deep-fried dumplings served with ginger sauce.

items.name: Tofu Triangles
items.description: Deep-fried tofu served with sweet & sour sauce topped with ground peanuts.

items.name: Pork Dumplings
items.description: Steamed or fried dumplings served with light soy sauce.

items.name: Scallion Pancakes
items.description: Pan-fried scallion pancakes.

items.name: Chive Pancake
items.description: Fried or steamed chive pancake served with ginger sauce.

items.name: Golden Triangle
items.description: Deep-fried egg rolls stuffed with vegetables, served with sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Crab Rangoon
items.description: Crabmeat & cream cheese filling inside crispy wonton wrappers.

items.name: Crispy Brussels Sprouts
items.description: Brussels sprouts seasoned with light soy sauce.

items.name: Vegetable Dumplings
items.description: All-natural edamame-skinned dumplings stuffed with a variety of vegetables, served with ginger soy sauce.

items.name: Coconut Shrimp
items.description: Shrimp dipped in batter and rolled in an aromatic blend of shredded coconut and panko bread crumbs.

items.name: Skinny Thai Taco
items.description: Ground chicken, peas, carrots, and romaine lettuce in sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Vegetarian Samplers
items.description: Vegetable rolls (2), golden triangles (2), fried chive pancakes (4), tofu triangles (4).

items.name: Sampler
items.description: Crispy rolls (2), vegetable rolls (2), satay (2), golden triangles (2), and crab rangoons (2) — served with peanut sauce & cucumber sauce.

items.name: Shrimp Salad (Yum Goong)
items.description: Fresh shrimp & clear noodles mixed with onion, tomato, cucumber, lemongrass, and lime juice.

items.name: Chicken Salad (Larb Gai)
items.description: Ground chicken with tomato, cucumber, lemongrass, lime juice, and special Thai sauce.

items.name: Papaya Salad
items.description: Shredded papaya mixed with string beans, tomato, and chili in spicy lime sauce, topped with peanuts. Served with sticky rice.

items.name: Tom Yum
items.description: World-famous Thai soup spiced with chilies, lemongrass, mushrooms, and lime juice; with choice of chicken or shrimp.

items.name: Seafood Tom Yum
items.description: Tom Yum with shrimp, squid, and scallops. Served as 16 oz.

items.name: Tom Kha Gai
items.description: Mild chicken coconut milk soup with galangal root, lime juice, mushrooms, and scallions. Served as 16 oz.

items.name: Ginger Soup
items.description: Choice of chicken or vegetable dumplings in clear broth with ginger, scallions, garlic, peas, and carrots. Served as 16 oz.

items.name: Thai Noodle Soup
items.description: Rice noodles in special Thai broth with choice of chicken, beef, or pork. Served as 32 oz.

items.name: Roasted Duck Noodle Soup
items.description: Rice noodles with sliced roasted duck & bean sprouts in duck broth, topped with chopped scallion & garlic. Served as 32 oz.

items.name: Pad Thai
items.description: Stir-fried rice noodles, egg, scallions, bean sprouts, and ground peanuts with choice of chicken, shrimp, or both.

items.name: Fiery Pad Thai
items.description: Spicy version of traditional Pad Thai with chicken & shrimp.

items.name: Drunken Noodles
items.description: Wide noodles stir-fried with ground chicken, egg, onion, carrots, green peppers, and basil.

items.name: Pad See-U
items.description: Wide noodles stir-fried with cabbage, broccoli, carrots, and bean sprouts — choice of protein.

items.name: Pad Woonsen
items.description: Glass noodles stir-fried with egg, cabbage, carrots, green peas, scallions, and baby corn — choice of protein.

items.name: Lad-Nar
items.description: Wide rice noodles with broccoli, mushrooms, carrots, baby corn, and egg in Thai-style gravy with chicken & shrimp.

items.name: Thai Special Fried Rice
items.description: Fried rice with shrimp, chicken, egg, peas, onion, and scallions.

items.name: Basil Fried Rice
items.description: House fried rice with basil & spicy Prik Paw.

items.name: Pineapple Fried Rice
items.description: Fried rice with chicken, shrimp, egg, pineapple, onion, peas, scallions, and curry powder.

items.name: Ham Fried Rice
items.description: Fried rice with egg, ham, pineapple, peas, carrots, onion, and scallion.

items.name: Lion City Noodles
items.description: Tiny noodles stir-fried with Thai spicy sauce, curry powder, carrots, peas, sprouts, onion, and scallions — choice of protein.

items.name: Bah-Mee Moo Dang
items.description: Egg noodles with honey-roasted BBQ pork, steamed bok choy, bean sprouts, scallion, cilantro, and crushed peanuts.

items.name: Thai Lo Mein
items.description: Lomein noodles stir-fried with beef, carrot, broccoli, scallion, and bean sprouts.

items.name: Pad Thai Woonsen
items.description: Traditional Pad Thai stir-fried with glass noodles, chicken & shrimp, egg, scallions, bean sprouts, and crushed peanuts.

items.name: See You In "Kale"
items.description: Pad See-U with super green kale stir-fried and seasoned with light sauce & tofu.

items.name: Khao Soi
items.description: Northern noodles in delicious light yellow curry, chicken, scallions, and fried shallots. Vegetarian version available.

tabs.intro: Chef's signature preparations, served with white rice.

items.description: Ground beef, chicken, or pork stir-fried with spicy authentic basil sauce, fresh chilies, mushrooms, green peppers, and Thai basil leaves; served with steamed rice & Thai-style fried egg.
